title: Minority ethnic-led business estimates, United Kingdom
description: Share of SMEs led by people from minority ethnic groups from the Longitudinal Small Business Survey 2022.

metadata.name: Longitudinal Small Business Survey 2022
metadata.methodology: Manual transcription from the Longitudinal Small Business Survey 2022. 'Minority ethnic-led' is defined as majority-led by people from ethnic minority groups. The survey does not separately identify Black-led businesses.
caveats: The UK does not maintain an official business register by owner ethnicity.
These are survey-based estimates for all minority ethnic groups combined, not Black-specific.
The survey covers SMEs (0–249 employees) only.
